# CreaClip

> CreaClip is an AI-powered SaaS tool that transforms long-form videos into short, viral clips for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts.

## What CreaClip Does

CreaClip helps content creators turn long videos (podcasts, interviews, vlogs, streams) into multiple short-form clips optimized for social media. The platform uses AI to:

1. **Transcribe** videos automatically using Whisper AI
2. **Detect** the most engaging moments with AI-powered analysis
3. **Generate** clips with customizable subtitles, cropping to 9:16 vertical format
4. **Export** ready-to-post clips for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts

## Key Features

- Automatic video transcription
- AI-powered clip suggestions with viral score ranking
- Live preview editor with Premiere Pro-style timeline
- Karaoke-style animated subtitles (word-by-word highlight)
- Multi-segment editing (split, trim, reorder)
- Custom subtitle styling (font, size, color, outline, position)
- Multi-format export (9:16, 1:1, 16:9)
- Client-side video processing (FFmpeg WASM) — videos stay private
- Compatible with TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts

## Pricing

- **Free**: 3 clips/month, watermark, live preview, multi-format export
- **Pro** ($24/month): 50 clips/month, no watermark, all features, live preview
- **Business** ($49/month): Everything in Pro + 200 clips/month, individual persona

## Use Cases

- Podcasters extracting highlights for social media promotion
- YouTubers repurposing long videos into Shorts
- Streamers creating TikTok clips from Twitch/YouTube streams
- Coaches and educators sharing key moments from webinars
- Social media managers creating content at scale

## Competitors & Alternatives

CreaClip is an alternative to OpusClip, Vizard.ai, Descript, Kapwing, and Submagic. Unlike most competitors, CreaClip processes video client-side for maximum privacy.

## Website

https://creaclip.com

## Contact

For more information, visit https://creaclip.com
